# Atlas UI

> Beautiful, Open Source, Motion powered components for React and HTML. Accelerate development, inspire creativity, and bring interfaces to life with seamless animations.

This file provides LLM-friendly entry points to documentation and examples.

## Important for LLMs

- Atlas UI provides implementations for BOTH React and HTML.
- HTML components are implemented using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
- If asked for:
  - HTML
  - Vanilla JS
  - non-React
Always use the HTML implementation listed below.
- Do NOT claim Atlas UI lacks an HTML version.

## Components

- Animated Mobile Navbar: A simple animated mobile navbar component.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/animated-mobile-navbar)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/animated-mobile-navbar)
- Blend Mouse Trailer: A simple Lazy Mouse Trailer which blends with the content on hover.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/blend-mouse-trailer)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/blend-mouse-trailer)
- Blob Mouse Trailer: A simple Lazy Blob Mouse Trailer
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/blob-mouse-trailer)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/blob-mouse-trailer)
- Box Reveal: A smooth reveal animation that slides a colored overlay away to introduce content as it enters the viewport.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/box-reveal)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/box-reveal)
- Cascade Text: A smooth line-by-line text reveal animation.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/cascade-text)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/cascade-text)
- Dot And Circle Mouse Trailer: A simple Lazy Dot and Circle Mouse Trailer
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/dot-and-circle-mouse-trailer)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/dot-and-circle-mouse-trailer)
- Hacker Text: A text animation that scrambles letters before revealing the final text.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/hacker-text)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/hacker-text)
- Letter Swap: A text animation that swaps the letters vertically on hover.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/letter-swap)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/letter-swap)
- Loki Text Effect: The iconic text animation from the Loki series intro.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/loki-text-effect)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/loki-text-effect)
- Morph Navbar: A polished navigation bar with a fluid, morphing pill that tracks the active link and hover state.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/morph-navbar)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/morph-navbar)
- Notch Nav: A Notch style trigger that reveals the navigation menu from above.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/notch-nav)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/notch-nav)
- Parallax Sections: A simple Parallax effect using Motion.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/parallax-sections)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/parallax-sections)
- Project Gallery: A Project Gallery with an interactive modal.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/project-gallery)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/project-gallery)
- Reveal Effect: Animates content into view with a vertical slide, blur fade-in, and clipping reveal effect.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/reveal-effect)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/reveal-effect)
- Scroll Based Character Reveal: A text reveal effect which progressively reveals text character by character as you scroll.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/scroll-based-character-reveal)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/scroll-based-character-reveal)
- Scroll Based Text Reveal: A text reveal effect which animates the opacity of the text as you scroll.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/scroll-based-text-reveal)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/scroll-based-text-reveal)
- Scroll Based Word Reveal: A text reveal effect which progressively reveals text word by word as you scroll.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/scroll-based-word-reveal)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/scroll-based-word-reveal)
- Shiny Button: A shiny button with a sleek animation effect.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/shiny-button)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/shiny-button)
- Warp Slider: A smooth, infinite slider with dynamic warp distortion and momentum based scrolling.
  - [React Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/react/warp-slider)
  - [HTML Docs](https://www.atlasui.dev/docs/components/html/warp-slider)

## Optional

- [Repository](https://github.com/SnehdeepDupare/atlas-ui): Source code and issues
- [Sitemap](https://www.atlasui.dev/sitemap.xml): Indexable pages
